name: Eric Chen
title: Founder & General Partner
bio: Founded Contrary to back the strongest student and young founders building transformative companies. Runs Contrary Talent, a network of top university students.

name: Pejman Nozad
title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Co-founded Pear VC to invest at the pre-seed and seed stage. Known for deep relationships with Stanford and Berkeley founders.

name: Mar Hershenson
title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Stanford PhD, co-founded Pear VC. Focuses on technical founders at the earliest stages, especially university spinouts.

name: Dorm Room Fund
title: Student-Run Venture Fund
bio: Student-run venture fund backed by First Round Capital. Invests exclusively in student founders across 9 university campuses.

name: Danielle Strachman
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded 1517 Fund to invest in founders who skip or drop out of college. Strong track record backing teenage and young adult entrepreneurs.

name: Michael Gibson
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded 1517 Fund. Former VP of Thiel Foundation. Believes in backing young founders building ambitious companies.

name: Ali Partovi
title: Founder & CEO
bio: Founded Neo to back the next generation of technology leaders through a community and accelerator for student founders and engineers.

name: Elizabeth Yin
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded Hustle Fund to back pre-seed founders with hustle. Former partner at 500 Global. Known for speed and accessibility.

name: Eric Bahn
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded Hustle Fund. Previously at Facebook and Beat the GMAT. Invests at the pre-seed stage in hustling founders.

name: Z Fellows
title: Fellowship Program
bio: 10-day program for ambitious young builders. Provides $10K grants plus mentorship from top founders and investors.

name: Rough Draft Ventures
title: Student Venture Fund
bio: Student-run venture fund backed by General Catalyst. Invests in student founders across top universities.

name: Y Combinator
title: Startup Accelerator
bio: Premier startup accelerator. Invests $500K in early-stage startups twice a year. Alumni include Airbnb, Stripe, Dropbox, DoorDash.

name: Techstars
title: Global Accelerator Network
bio: Global accelerator network running industry-specific programs. Provides $120K investment, mentorship, and network access.

name: 500 Global
title: Venture Capital & Accelerator
bio: Global venture firm investing at the seed stage with accelerator programs worldwide. Portfolio spans 80+ countries.

name: MassChallenge
title: Zero-Equity Accelerator
bio: Global zero-equity startup accelerator. Awards cash prizes and provides mentorship without taking equity.

name: Jason Calacanis
title: Founder & Lead Investor
bio: Founded LAUNCH accelerator and fund. Angel investor in Uber, Calm, Robinhood. Hosts This Week in Startups podcast.

name: Founder Institute
title: Pre-Seed Accelerator
bio: World's largest pre-seed accelerator. Helps aspiring founders launch companies through structured programs in 200+ cities.

name: Plug and Play Tech Center
title: Accelerator & Corporate Innovation
bio: Silicon Valley accelerator connecting startups with corporations. Industry-specific programs in fintech, health, supply chain, and more.

name: IndieBio
title: Biotech Accelerator
bio: World's largest seed biotech accelerator. Invests $500K in biology-driven startups across food, health, and sustainability.

name: HAX
title: Hardware Accelerator
bio: World's largest hardware and deeptech accelerator. Invests in robotics, IoT, health devices, and industrial tech.

name: Mike Maples Jr.
title: Co-Founder & Partner
bio: Co-founded Floodgate, one of the first micro-VC funds. Coined the term 'thunder lizard' for startups with huge potential. Early backer of Twitter and Lyft.

name: Ann Miura-Ko
title: Co-Founder & Partner
bio: Co-founded Floodgate. Stanford PhD. Forbes Midas List investor. Known for pattern recognition in consumer and enterprise startups.

name: Ron Conway
title: Founder
bio: Legendary Silicon Valley angel investor. Backed Google, Facebook, Twitter, and hundreds of iconic startups. Known as the 'Godfather of Silicon Valley.'

name: Garry Tan
title: President & CEO of Y Combinator
bio: Co-founded Initialized Capital. Now CEO of Y Combinator. Former YC partner. Invests in seed-stage companies building foundational technology.

name: Charles Hudson
title: Managing Partner & Founder
bio: Founded Precursor Ventures to invest at the pre-seed stage. Former VP at Serious Energy and GM at Google. Focuses on underrepresented founders.

name: Hunter Walk
title: Co-Founder & Partner
bio: Co-founded Homebrew to invest at the seed stage in the 'Bottom Up Economy.' Former Head of Product at YouTube. Known for blog posts on startup culture.

name: Satya Patel
title: Co-Founder & Partner
bio: Co-founded Homebrew. Former VP Product at Twitter. Seed investor focusing on commerce, infrastructure, and the future of work.

name: Ben Lerer
title: Managing Partner
bio: Co-founded Lerer Hippeau, a NYC-based early-stage VC. Former CEO of Thrillist. Focuses on consumer internet, e-commerce, and media.

name: David Tisch
title: Co-Founder
bio: Co-founded BoxGroup. Former Managing Director of Techstars NYC. One of New York's most prolific seed investors.

name: Eric Paley
title: Managing Partner
bio: Managing Partner at Founder Collective. Seed-stage VC that invests $1-2M per company. Known for founder-friendly terms.

name: Jennifer Carolan
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded Reach Capital, the leading edtech-focused VC. Former teacher and NewSchools Venture Fund leader. Deeply connected to education ecosystem.

name: Tory Patterson
title: Co-Founder & Managing Director
bio: Co-founded Owl Ventures, the largest edtech-focused venture fund globally. Invests across the education lifecycle from K-12 to workforce.

name: Deborah Quazzo
title: Managing Partner
bio: Managing Partner at GSV Ventures, focused exclusively on education and workforce technology. Hosts the ASU+GSV Summit.

name: Micky Malka
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Ribbit Capital to invest in companies disrupting financial services. One of the top fintech VCs globally.

name: Nigel Morris
title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Co-founded QED Investors. Co-founder of Capital One. One of the most experienced fintech investors globally.

name: Jordan Jacobs
title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Co-founded Radical Ventures to invest at the intersection of AI and commercialization. Backs AI-first companies from seed to growth.

name: Andrew Ng
title: Founder & General Partner
bio: Founded AI Fund to build and invest in AI-powered companies. Co-founder of Coursera, former Chief Scientist at Baidu, founder of Google Brain.

name: Vinod Khosla
title: Founder
bio: Founded Khosla Ventures. Co-founder of Sun Microsystems. Invests in breakthrough technologies across health, AI, and sustainability.

name: Chris Sacca
title: Co-Founder
bio: Co-founded Lowercarbon Capital to invest in climate tech. Previously ran Lowercase Capital, early investor in Twitter, Uber, Instagram.

name: Breakthrough Energy Ventures
title: Climate VC Fund
bio: Founded by Bill Gates. Invests patient capital in climate tech companies that can reduce greenhouse gas emissions by at least 500M tons per year.

name: Naval Ravikant
title: Angel Investor & Founder
bio: Co-founded AngelList. One of Silicon Valley's most prolific angel investors. Known for investing in founders with strong first principles thinking.

name: Elad Gil
title: Angel Investor & Author
bio: Prolific angel investor and author of 'The High Growth Handbook.' Former VP at Twitter, co-founder of Color Genomics. Invests at seed through growth.

name: Alexis Ohanian
title: Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founder of Reddit. Founded Seven Seven Six to invest at the seed stage in consumer, gaming, and crypto companies.

name: Sahil Lavingia
title: Founder & CEO / Angel Investor
bio: Founder of Gumroad. Prolific angel investor backing early-stage startups. Known for transparent investing and supporting solo founders.

name: Balaji Srinivasan
title: Angel Investor & Author
bio: Former CTO of Coinbase, former GP at a16z. Stanford academic. Invests in crypto, biotech, and network state projects.

name: Josh Buckley
title: Angel Investor & CEO
bio: CEO of Product Hunt. Angel investor backing pre-seed and seed startups. Started his first company as a teenager.

name: Ryan Hoover
title: Angel Investor & Founder
bio: Founder of Product Hunt. Runs Weekend Fund investing in consumer, community, and creator economy startups at the pre-seed stage.

name: Josh Kopelman
title: Founder & Partner
bio: Founded First Round Capital to be the best partner for seed-stage founders. Created the Fast Track program for young founders. Former founder of Half.com (acquired by eBay).

name: Hemant Taneja
title: CEO & Managing Director
bio: CEO of General Catalyst. Focuses on responsible innovation across health, climate, and financial inclusion. Author of 'Unscaled.'

name: Andreessen Horowitz (a16z Seed)
title: Seed Program
bio: a16z's dedicated seed program investing $500K-$2M in early-stage founders across all sectors. Provides full a16z platform services.

name: Sequoia Capital (Arc)
title: Pre-Seed & Seed Program
bio: Sequoia Arc is the firm's program for pre-seed and seed founders. Provides community, mentorship, and investment from day one.

name: Soma Capital
title: Pre-Seed VC
bio: Pre-seed VC that backs exceptional founders at the earliest stages. Known for fast decisions and high-volume investing.

name: Ramtin Naimi
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Abstract Ventures to invest at the pre-seed and seed stage. Former youngest VC in Silicon Valley. Focus on consumer and enterprise.

name: Li Jin
title: Founder & General Partner
bio: Founded Atelier Ventures to invest in the passion economy and creator tools. Former partner at a16z focusing on consumer and marketplace startups.

name: On Deck
title: Fellowship & Community
bio: Community-driven platform connecting founders, offering fellowships and investment for early-stage builders.

name: Thiel Fellowship
title: Fellowship for Young Builders
bio: Peter Thiel's fellowship giving $100K to young people (under 23) to skip college and build companies. Alumni include Vitalik Buterin and Austin Russell.

name: Mamoon Hamid
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Kleiner Perkins. Led seed and Series A investments in enterprise and SaaS companies. Previously at Social Capital.

name: Sarah Tavel
title: General Partner
bio: General Partner at Benchmark. Developed the 'Hierarchy of Engagement' framework. Former PM at Pinterest. Invests in consumer and marketplace.

name: Mercedes Bent
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Lightspeed. Focuses on consumer, health, and edtech investments. Former Bain consultant. Passionate about impact-driven startups.

name: Vanessa Larco
title: Partner
bio: Partner at NEA focusing on consumer and enterprise. Former PM at Box. Invests in products that solve real user problems.

name: Talia Goldberg
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Bessemer. Focuses on cloud, cybersecurity, and consumer health. Known for the Bessemer Cloud Index.

name: Hans Tung
title: Managing Partner
bio: Managing Partner at GGV. Global investor spanning US and Asia. Forbes Midas List. Focus on cross-border consumer and enterprise.

name: Reid Hoffman
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Greylock. Co-founder of LinkedIn. Prolific investor and author. Board member at Microsoft. Focuses on network effects and AI.

name: Arun Mathew
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Accel. Focuses on enterprise software, developer tools, and cybersecurity at the seed and Series A stage.

name: Mark Goldberg
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Index Ventures. Focuses on fintech and marketplace companies at the seed and Series A stage.

name: Arlan Hamilton
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Backstage Capital to invest in underrepresented founders — women, people of color, and LGBTQ+ entrepreneurs.

name: Henri Pierre-Jacques
title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Co-founded Harlem Capital with the mission of investing in 1,000 diverse founders over 20 years. Pre-seed and seed stage.

name: Manan Mehta
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Founded Unshackled Ventures to specifically back immigrant founders in the US by helping with visa sponsorship and investment.

name: Sarah Guo
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Conviction to invest in AI-native companies. Former partner at Greylock. Deep focus on applied AI and foundation models.

name: Nat Friedman
title: Angel Investor
bio: Former CEO of GitHub. Prolific AI investor. Co-leads investments with Daniel Gross in AI companies at the earliest stages.

name: Daniel Gross
title: Angel Investor & Founder
bio: Founder of Pioneer (global talent search). Former head of AI at Apple. Co-invests with Nat Friedman in AI startups. Backs young technical founders globally.

name: Pioneer
title: Global Talent Accelerator
bio: Global accelerator that finds talented individuals anywhere in the world. Provides funding, mentorship, and community regardless of location or background.

name: Emerge Education
title: EdTech Accelerator
bio: European edtech-focused accelerator and VC. Invests in early-stage education and workforce technology companies.

name: Gradient Ventures
title: Google's AI Fund
bio: Google's AI-focused venture fund. Invests in and supports early-stage AI companies with Google resources, expertise, and cloud credits.

name: Matt McIlwain
title: Managing Director
bio: Managing Director at Madrona. Pacific Northwest focused VC investing in AI, cloud, and intelligent applications from seed through growth.

name: Two Sigma Ventures
title: Data-Driven VC
bio: Venture arm of Two Sigma. Invests in companies building with data science, AI, and engineering-first approaches.

name: Aydin Senkut
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Felicis Ventures. Former Google employee #85. One of the most consistent seed investors in Silicon Valley.

name: Annie Kadavy
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Redpoint. Focuses on consumer social, health and wellness, and community-driven businesses.

name: Sam Lessin
title: Co-Founder & Partner
bio: Co-founded Slow Ventures. Former VP of Product at Facebook. Invests in unconventional founders and business models.

name: David Sacks
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Co-founded Craft Ventures. Former COO of PayPal, founder of Yammer. Invests in SaaS, fintech, and AI companies.

name: Brett Gibson
title: General Partner
bio: General Partner at Initialized Capital. Seed-stage investor focusing on technical founders building infrastructure and developer tools.

name: Joe Lonsdale
title: Founder & Partner
bio: Founded 8VC. Co-founded Palantir, Addepar, OpenGov. Invests in government tech, defense, healthcare, and real estate tech.

name: Color Capital
title: Diverse Founder VC
bio: Pre-seed fund focused on investing in Black and Latinx founders building technology companies.

name: Yasmin Cruz Ferrine
title: Co-Founder & General Partner
bio: Founded Visible Hands to combine venture capital with an accelerator for underrepresented founders at the pre-seed stage.

name: Maya Capital
title: Emerging Market VC
bio: Early-stage VC fund focused on LatAm and underrepresented founders. Seed and pre-seed investments in global markets.

name: Amy Cheetham
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Costanoa Ventures. Focuses on enterprise and data infrastructure at the seed and Series A stage.

name: Coatue Management
title: Technology Investment
bio: Technology-focused investment firm spanning seed through growth. Data-driven approach to identifying and scaling tech companies.

name: Y Combinator Startup School
title: Free Online Accelerator
bio: Free online program by YC for aspiring founders. Provides curriculum, community, and tools. No equity taken. Open to all.

name: Antler
title: Global Venture Builder
bio: Global day-zero investor and venture builder. Helps talented individuals find co-founders and build companies across 27 locations.

name: Entrepreneur First
title: Talent Investor
bio: Talent investor that selects individuals before they have teams or ideas. Helps build companies from scratch across global cohorts.

name: Village Global
title: Network-Driven VC
bio: Network-driven seed fund backed by Bill Gates, Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, and other tech leaders. Invests through a mentor network.

name: Republic
title: Crowdfunding & VC Platform
bio: Investment platform enabling anyone to invest in startups. Also runs Republic Venture Partners for seed-stage investments.

name: Wefunder
title: Equity Crowdfunding
bio: Leading equity crowdfunding platform. YC alumni. Enables startups to raise from their community. No accredited investor requirement.

name: Nihal Mehta
title: Founding General Partner
bio: Founding GP of Eniac Ventures. Thesis-driven pre-seed investor focused on mobile-first and AI-native companies.

name: Dream Ventures
title: Pre-Seed VC
bio: Pre-seed fund investing in underestimated founders. Focus on diverse and non-traditional founders with big ambitions.

name: Aamir Virani
title: Founder
bio: High school accelerator helping teenage founders build and launch startups. Provides mentorship, curriculum, and community.

name: Launch House
title: Founder Community & Fund
bio: Community and fund for young founders. Provides co-living, co-working, and investment for early-stage companies.

name: Buildspace (nights & weekends)
title: Builder Accelerator
bio: Accelerator for builders turning side projects into startups. 6-week 'Nights & Weekends' program. Open to all ages.

name: Neo Venture Partners
title: University-Linked Fund
bio: Investment arm of Neo. Backs graduates and community members building transformative companies with a focus on technical innovation.

name: Gaurav Garg
title: Founder & Managing Partner
bio: Founded Wing VC for enterprise-focused seed investments. Hires former enterprise operators as partners. Data-driven approach.

name: Sarah Smith
title: Partner
bio: Partner at Bain Capital Ventures. Former Quora PM. Invests in consumer, social, and marketplace companies at the seed stage.

name: True Ventures
title: Seed-Stage VC
bio: Seed-stage venture firm helping founders from inception. Known for True University program supporting student innovators.
